summary: On March 24, 2026, Rubicon Center operators reported destroying 131 Ukrainian targets, including personnel and UAVs, across multiple directions, while Kraken Regiment FPV units destroyed Russian MLRS, tanks, and artillery. A Russian FPV drone struck a commuter train in Kharkiv region, killing one and injuring six. The "Elka" anti-drone system intercepted a Ukrainian "Maya" fixed-wing drone via kinetic impact. Russian forces downed a Ka-52 near Nadiivka, Donetsk, with additional drones targeting the crew during evacuation. Iranian-backed militias used fiber-optic FPV drones to attack US Victory Base near Baghdad. Rubicon Center data shows 35.5% of destroyed targets were unmanned systems, highlighting drones' dominance on the battlefield.
